name: Forescout
description: Monitor Forescout eyeSight network access control for device compliance, managed device inventory, and active policies/alerts

credentialFields.label: Enterprise Manager URL
credentialFields.helpText: The HTTPS URL of your Forescout Enterprise Manager (e.g. https://em.yourcompany.com)

credentialFields.label: Web API Username
credentialFields.helpText: Username configured in the Forescout Web API plugin settings

credentialFields.label: Web API Password
credentialFields.helpText: Password configured in the Forescout Web API plugin settings

checks.name: Secure Devices
checks.description: Retrieves all managed devices from Forescout and checks their compliance status based on policy matching

checks.name: Device List
checks.description: Retrieves the full inventory of managed devices from Forescout for compliance evidence

checks.name: Monitoring & Alerting
checks.description: Verifies that Forescout has active policies configured for network monitoring and alerting
